Thanks for contributing to MacCleaner! Please fill in the sections below.
PRs missing required sections may be closed without review.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One-paragraph description of the change. What does this PR do? -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this change needed? Link related issues with `Fixes #123` / `Closes #123`. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to break)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] CI / build / tooling

## Testing notes

<!--
Describe how you verified your change. Include:
- Manual repro steps
- Test cases added (Tests/MacCleanerTests)
- macOS versions tested (14 / 15 / 26)
- Apple Silicon vs Intel
-->

## Screenshots / screen recordings

<!-- Required for any UI change. Drag images directly into this textarea. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the existing style (`swiftlint` and `swiftformat` pass)
- [ ] I added tests that cover my change (or explained below why none are needed)
- [ ] `swift build -Xswiftc -warnings-as-errors` succeeds locally
- [ ] `swift test` succeeds locally
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org)
